combined_text: 'It's an hallelujah moment every day!' Ted 'Golden Voice' Williams shows off new pad (and girlfriend) a year after being homeless "'It's an hallelujah moment every day!' Ted 'Golden Voice' Williams shows off new pad (and girlfriend) a year after being homeless By Julian Gavaghan Updated: 04:19 EDT, 17 January 201245View comments Just a year ago he was the homeless man with the ‘golden voice' begging on the side of the highway.
